channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Japanese snack packages turning black-and-white as Iran war depletes ink supply
item.description: Some snack packages are switching to black-and-white due to the Iran war disrupting a key ingredient for colored ink. Calbee's chips...

item.title: Putin hails Russia's test launch of a new ballistic missile
item.description: Russia successfully tested a new intercontinental ballistic missile as part of its nuclear modernization efforts. The nuclear-capable Sarmat missile...

item.title: A close look at one military family's suspended life amid the ongoing Iran war
item.description: Military life has always involved uncertainty, but the Iran war brings new fear and unknowns for many families.

item.title: Iran war costs $29 billion so far, and U.S. students show math improvement
item.description: Pentagon officials estimate the Iran war has cost $29 billion, while a new Education Scorecard shows U.S. students improving in math.
